narrative.narrative: Fear has a stranglehold on the market as the Fear & Greed Index sinks to 31, mirroring the deep capitulation seen in August 2024. Yet beneath the surface, stablecoin reserves are quietly expanding, signaling that smart money is loading dry powder while retail panics—a classic divergence that historically precedes a relief rally. The tape feels heavy, but the liquidity foundations are being laid for a sharp mean-reversion squeeze once the last weak hands are shaken out.
narrative.headline: Silent Accumulators Stalk the Panic

next_move.outlook: A short-term capitulation wick is likely to be aggressively bought, setting the stage for a rapid reclamation of the $70,000 level as sidelined capital is deployed.

consensus.key_reasoning: The live score anchors us in Anxiety (39-46), and while the 78% pattern match to the August 2024 bottom is compelling, massive divergences in ETF flows, VIX, and BTC dominance prevent a bullish call right now.
